title: CafeTEq Mixing Bowls Set of 3 Professional Stainless Steel German - 1.5, 2.5, and 4 Litre Capacities - Ideal for Mixing, Chilling, and Serving - Stackable for Easy Storage
features: Premium Stainless Steel Construction: Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, these mixing bowls won't stain or retain odors, ensuring a clean and lasting kitchen companion.
Perfect Depth for Electric Mixer Use: The ideal depth for effortless electric mixer use, making your baking and cooking experiences seamless and enjoyable
Three Sizes for Varied Needs: 18cm Bowl Capacity - 1.5 Litres 22cm Bowl Capacity - 2.5 Litres 26cm Bowl Capacity - 4 Litres
Stackable Design: Conveniently stackable inside each other, these bowls save valuable kitchen space, making storage a breeze.
Rolled Edge for Easy Grip: Designed with a rolled edge, these bowls offer a comfortable grip, providing stability while mixing or pouring.
description: Upgrade your kitchen with our Set of 3 Professional Stainless Steel German Mixing Bowls. Crafted with precision and functionality in mind, these bowls are the perfect addition to any culinary workspace. Premium Stainless Steel Quality: Our mixing bowls are made from premium stainless steel, ensuring durability and resistance to stains and odors. Enjoy a clean and odor-free cooking and baking experience with these high-quality bowls. Effortless Mixing and Pouring: The perfect depth of these bowls makes them ideal for use with electric mixers. Experience the joy of effortless mixing, and thanks to the rolled edge, pouring becomes a breeze. Versatile and Stylish: These bowls aren't just for mixing; they're versatile enough to chill, marinate, and even serve as elegant salad bowls. Elevate your kitchen and dining presentation with these stylish and functional additions. Space-Saving Stackable Design: When not in use, these bowls stack neatly inside each other, saving valuable kitchen space. Keep your kitchen organized and clutter-free with this smart and practical design.

specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Baking, Cake making, Dessert, Pasta, Salad
